hero.subheading: A localized demand engine designed to convert search and paid traffic into booked service calls at scale.

background.title: Engineering Predictable Growth
description: Moxie Pest Control had strong demand but inefficient lead generation and inconsistent conversion. Ideom was brought in to rebuild the acquisition system from the ground up—transforming fragmented lead generation into a high-efficiency revenue engine.
By aligning paid acquisition, high-intent targeting, and optimized landing pages, we created a system that scales across multiple service regions without the overhead of traditional sales cycles.
background.quote: Ideom turned our lead generation into a system that actually scales. The growth became predictable.

challenges.title: Fragmented Acquisition
description: High cost per lead across traditional and non-optimized paid channels was stalling scalability.
Inconsistent lead quality across different service areas led to low booking rates and wasted sales time.
Generic landing pages lacked local relevance, resulting in high bounce rates among high-intent searchers.

solutions.title: The Demand Engine
description: We implemented a localized paid acquisition system, segmenting campaigns by service area to maximize relevance and reduce wasted spend.
High-conversion landing pages were built with localized trust signals, optimized for mobile-first high-intent traffic.
Aligned messaging from ad to call improved booking rates and ensured lead quality remained high at scale.

emailSequence.title: Inside the Campaigns
description: 1. Emergency Service: Captured immediate local demand through 'today only' availability triggers.
2. Trust & Authority: Built confidence through social proof and localized guarantees.
3. Seasonal Surge: Leveraged bug-surge timing to capture market share before competitors.
4. The Result: A unified system that turns clicks into scheduled service calls.

thoughtProcess.title: The strategic playbook
content: In home services, speed and trust are the only currencies that matter.
We didn't just want more leads; we wanted better bookings. Our three-pillar strategy ensured this;
• Local Context: Every ad felt like it was coming from a neighbor, not a corporation.
• Frictionless Paths: We removed every unnecessary click between a search and a phone call.
• Offer Mastery: We structured offers that made the choice to book Moxie inevitable.
Within 12 months, we added $1.2M in revenue growth while strictly reducing the cost to acquire each customer.

emails.label: Google Search: Intent Capture
explanation: Focused on 'Emergency Pest Control' and 'Near Me' keywords.
Used high-urgency headlines and call-focused CTAs.
Achieved the highest conversion-to-booking rate in the campaign history.
Resulted in immediate revenue impact from day one of launch.

emails.label: Meta: Social Awareness
explanation: Used trust-based creative showing real technicians and happy customers.
Educated the local market on seasonal pest risks before they became emergencies.
Reduced risk perception and increased brand confidence significantly.
Improved lead quality by pre-qualifying prospects through educational content.

emails.label: Landing Pages: The closer
explanation: Developed location-specific pages that loaded in under 2 seconds.
Integrated social proof and trust badges directly above the fold.
Implemented a simple 2-step lead capture process to maximize volume.
Increased conversion rates by 44% compared to the original site.

results.label: Revenue Growth
results.desc: Added revenue generated within the first 12 months.

results.label: Lower CPL
results.desc: Reduction in cost per lead through funnel efficiency.

results.label: Efficiency
results.desc: Scaling across regions without loss in performance.

testimonials.quote: Ideom turned our lead generation into a system that actually scales. The growth became predictable.
